title: million dollar deal to transform global network operations with AI
description: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) and ABB signed a multi-million, multi-year agreement to transform the technology leader's global network operations using artificial intelligence. The expanded collaboration marks the next phase of a 20-year partnership between the two entities.

title: Mulling AI investment, Anthropic lobbied Australia on copyright law
description: Anthropic's chief executive Dario Amodei has lobbied Australian officials for "copyright reform" as the artificial intelligence giant seeks to make a major investment in the country, official briefing notes released Monday show. According to briefing notes released under freedom of information law, Amodei had requested the meeting to discuss barriers to AI training in Australia, "particularly copyright reform".

title: TSMC Q2 revenue jumps 36% from a year earlier, beating market expectations
description: TAIPEI: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reported on Monday second-quarter revenue of 1.27 trillion Taiwan dollars ($39.63 billion), beating market expectations and rising 36% from a year earlier on surging interest in artificial intelligence applications.

title: Global Market: AI stocks take a breather after blistering rally as investors reassess valuations
description: AI-linked stocks are showing signs of fatigue as investors lock in profits. Semiconductor and memory-chip makers have seen sharp retreats from recent highs. Investors are now demanding stronger earnings growth and clearer profit evidence. A rotation into software and cloud providers is also occurring within technology. Despite this, the long-term outlook for artificial intelligence remains strong.
content:
After months of relentless gains driven by enthusiasm around artificial intelligence, some of the world's best-performing AI-linked stocks are showing signs of fatigue as investors lock in profits and reassess lofty valuations.
The recent pullback ha... [5605 chars]

title: So many headwinds for the ASX, but war is not one of them
description: Soft bank earnings growth and a lack of exposure to the booming artificial intelligence trade will keep a handbrake on the local sharemarket, fund managers warn.
content:

title: TSMC posts record revenue in second quarter on AI demand
description: Revenue in the second quarter rose 36% from a year earlier to ​a record high on surging interest in artificial intelligence applications. On its ​last earnings call in April, the company predicted second-quarter revenue of between $39 billion and $40.2 billion. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing ​Co (TSMC) is a major supplier to companies including Nvidia and Apple.

title: Supreme Court's AI Rules Explained: Why India Wants Artificial Intelligence In Courts, But Not In Judicial Decisions
description: The Supreme Court is drafting rules to regulate the use of artificial intelligence in courts after AI-generated fake judgments surfaced in legal proceedings. Here's what the proposed framework means for judges, lawyers and litigants.
